name: components/radio-group
description: A set of mutually exclusive options where only one item can be selected at a time. Provides a complete composition system with RadioGroup, RadioGroupItems, RadioGroupItem, RadioGroupItemInput, RadioGroupItemControl, RadioGroupItemIndicator, RadioGroupLabel, RadioGroupItemLabel, RadioGroupDescription, and RadioGroupErrorMessage. Built on Kobalte Radio Group with full keyboard navigation, invalid-state styling, and ARIA support.
useCases: Payment method selection (Credit Card, PayPal, Bank Transfer) in checkout flows
Shipping speed options (Standard, Express, Overnight) on order review pages
Theme preference selectors (Light, Dark, System) in user settings
Single-answer survey questions where only one choice is allowed per question
usage: import { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItems, RadioGroupItem, RadioGroupItemControl, RadioGroupItemIndicator, RadioGroupLabel, RadioGroupItemLabel, RadioGroupDescription, RadioGroupErrorMessage } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/radio-group"
